problem id: 3a90fdf6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  00100011 -> 00000000
  11111000 -> 00000000
  01100010 -> 00000000
  11011010 -> 01000000
  00101000 -> 00000000
  00001100 -> 00000000
  01000111 -> 00000000
  01001001 -> 00100000
  11101001 -> 00100000

query: 11111101
predicted answer: 10100000
